channel.title: docs on Rohit Goswami
channel.description: Recent content in docs on Rohit Goswami

item.title: Talk Supplements for SERI'21
item.description: A meta-post on a talk I was to give at SERI'21 Background Much the same as the rationale behind my other presentation meta-posts, that is: I would like to preserve questions I would like to collect the video, slides and other miscellaneous stuff in one location 1 It would be nice to have my own thoughts here afterwards Details SERI or the Software Engineering Research in India meeting is the only informal event dedicated to software engineering in the subcontinent, so it was rather gratifying to be accepted, and, to present on Modern documentation across languages.
